name: subtitle
label: Subtitle
default: An intelligence mesh that connects your context, coordinates execution, and scales what works — so your enterprise runs on insight, not inertia.

default.title: Connected Context
default.subtitle: Business, customer, policy, and workflow context stay connected.
default.hover_subtitle: Goals, history, documents, data, and decisions stay connected across every interaction.

default.title: Coordinated Execution
default.subtitle: AI and human work move in sync across complex workflows.
default.hover_subtitle: Orchestration keeps work moving across analysis, action, approval, and escalation.

default.title: Governed Scale
default.subtitle: Autonomy expands without losing oversight or control.
default.hover_subtitle: Policies, approvals, auditability, and escalation are built into execution from the start.

default.title: Reusable Advantage
default.subtitle: What works once becomes repeatable business capability.
default.hover_subtitle: Proven patterns, components, and workbenches reused across teams and business units.
